DATABASE_URL.description: SQLite database file (for development) or PostgreSQL connection string

ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.description: ElevenLabs API key for TTS (voice Vanessa)

HEALTHSHERPA_API_KEY.description: HealthSherpa API key for ACA plan quoting (optional)

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public URL of the deployed application (e.g., https://yourapp.up.railway.app)

CRON_SECRET.description: Secret token for cron job authentication

GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD.description: Gmail app password for sending email notifications
